cast.name: 杰瑞米·布雷特 Jeremy Brett
爱德华·哈德威克 Edward Hardwicke

writer.name: Ian Kennedy Martin Ian Kennedy Martin

introduction: Sherlock Holmes teams up with Van Der Valk, Taggart and Wexford to solve a special murder mystery written by Ian Kennedy Martin for the 1992 ITV Telethon. Holmes (Jeremy Brett), with his sidekick Watson (Edward Hardwicke), discovers a gruesome double murder. But he has a deadly appointment with his arch-enemy Moriarty and never gets the chance to solve The Four Oaks Mystery. The trail lies dormant for a hundred years until it is rediscovered by Dutch detective Van der Valk (Barry Foster). It leads to Glasgow, where Taggart (Mark McManus) picks up the grisly thread before finally reaching Ruth Rendell’s Inspector Wexford George Baker.
